description: Confidence below 0.85 → recommended_action=ISSUE_ONLY (don't auto-heal under-confident classifications).

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: Confidence threshold check fires when LLM is uncertain
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: Healer downstream MUST NOT attempt auto-fix on this test
rubric_hints.error_propagation: Low confidence is not an error; routes to safer ISSUE_ONLY
